seoTitle: MetaPreview — Meta/OpenGraph tag generator + social preview
seoDescription: Meta/OpenGraph tag generator + social preview. Built for devs, marketers, seos. Free to use.

faq.a: Devs, marketers, SEOs. If that's you and "bad link previews; missing tags" sounds familiar, this was built for your exact situation.

faq.q: Why would I pay for this?
How fast do I get it?
faq.a: Right now — everything on this page works immediately, free.
No. The tool runs 100% in your browser — nothing you type or upload ever leaves your device. You can verify in DevTools: zero network calls during use.

validationMetric: 200+ visits; target 25+ successful uses & 2+ Pro clicks in 14 days
deploymentTarget: Vercel (static) — primary; Cloudflare Pages / Netlify alternates
killCriteria: <50 visits AND 0 Pro interest after 14 days
biggestRisk: Commodity space, hard to rank; free alternatives everywhere
first10: SEO long-tail + answer 5 forum threads; submit to tool directories; 1 launch post
